content.mainTitle: Free YouTube Shorts Downloader - Save Vertical Videos
content.intro1: Y2mate Shorts Downloader saves YouTube Shorts in their native 9:16 vertical format-perfect for mobile viewing. Download Shorts instantly with no watermark, no app required.
content.intro2: Our downloader preserves the portrait orientation (1080x1920) so you can watch or share on mobile devices. Download unlimited Shorts for free-no file size limits.

instructions.title: How to download YouTube Shorts
steps: Open YouTube Shorts on mobile or desktop and copy the Short's URL from the share button.
Paste the Shorts link into Y2mate's input field and click Start.
Select vertical format (9:16 portrait) to preserve the Short's native mobile orientation.
Download the Short video to your device-ready to watch or repost on social media.

whyChoose.title: Why use Y2mate for Shorts
reasons: Preserves vertical 9:16 aspect ratio-no black bars or cropping on mobile screens.
Instant Shorts detection-automatically recognizes Short URLs and optimizes download settings.
No watermark added to your downloaded Shorts videos.
Download Shorts up to 1080p resolution for crisp quality on high-end phones.
Perfect for saving viral Shorts, dance challenges, and trending clips to watch offline.

items.question: What is Y2mate Shorts Downloader?
items.answer: Y2mate Shorts Downloader is a free tool specialized for downloading YouTube Shorts in their native vertical 9:16 format. It preserves the portrait orientation for mobile viewing and supports downloads up to 1080p resolution. No app installation required-download Shorts directly in your browser.

items.question: Are downloaded Shorts free?
items.answer: Yes, downloading YouTube Shorts via Y2mate is completely free. Save unlimited Shorts with no file size caps, daily limits, or subscription fees. All vertical formats and resolutions are available at no cost.

items.question: What is the Shorts 9:16 format?
items.answer: 9:16 is the vertical aspect ratio for Shorts (portrait orientation). Typical resolution is 1080 pixels wide by 1920 pixels tall-optimized for mobile phone screens held vertically, matching Instagram Reels and TikTok format.

items.question: Can I repost downloaded Shorts?
items.answer: You can download Shorts for personal offline viewing. If reposting to social media, always credit the original creator and respect YouTube's Terms of Service. Y2mate does not add watermarks, but redistribution may require permission.

items.question: How do I find a Short's URL?
items.answer: On mobile, tap the three-dot menu on a Short and select "Share" → "Copy link." On desktop, click the Short and copy the URL from your browser address bar. Shorts URLs typically include "/shorts/" in the path.

items.question: Can I convert Shorts to horizontal video?
items.answer: Y2mate downloads Shorts in their original vertical format. Converting vertical to horizontal would require adding black bars or cropping content. For best quality, keep Shorts in their native 9:16 portrait orientation.
